smoke.detail: Box smoke on FTO-43 fixture (placeholder SMILES CC(=O)O). Adapter shelled out via pixi run --manifest-path in its isolated env; output validated against core.schemas.OutputRecord. endpoint_values = {is_solved: true (bool), top_score: 0.9976287063411217, number_of_steps: 1, number_of_routes: 1, number_of_precursors: 1, number_of_precursors_in_stock: 1, number_of_nodes: 2}; uncertainty: null; route trees in raw.routes. USPTO template policy + ZINC stock configured via cached config.yml. pytest tests/test_model_aizynthfinder.py -m model: 1 passed in 12.93s (PYTEST_EXIT=0).

note: AiZynthFinder retrosynthesis route-search adapter (synthesizability rung 3, shortlist, in_bulk_loop=False). PyPI aizynthfinder 4.4.1; USPTO policy + ZINC stock cached under /zfs; box-solved pixi.lock (44 linux-64 entries, 203 sha256). Landmine honored: reads is_solved, not solved.
